_doc: FROZEN GOLDEN — captured 2026-06-11 from the live InsightKind class (pre-deletion), F3 lote-2. Deep-equaled against the descriptor-synthesized port in test_lote2_descriptor_equivalence.py. POST-CAPTURE EDIT (censo-12-kinds, 2026-07-20): identity.docs / identity.display_label / schema descriptions were re-synced from the descriptor after prose-only corrections (removed claims of producers/verifiers that do not ship in this distribution; disambiguated the three 'Insight' display labels). No Kind identity, field, type, requiredness, default or enum changed.

identity.docs: An Insight binds a perpetual question to a target UA (oracle-X) — it is the oracle's DEFINITION, not an insight; the answers come back as StatusReport docs. The UA owns the persona + heuristics + LLM selection. A runner was to iterate active Insights and dispatch each to its target_ua (which would emit a StatusReport via the create_status_report tool) — that runner does NOT ship in this distribution, so cadence_hours/active are declarations with no scheduler.

cadence_hours.description: How often the runner re-dispatches the target_ua. 0 disables auto-run (manual only via /agent endpoint).

description.description: Optional 1-2 sentence human description of what this oracle answers. The INSIGHT.md body.

evidence_kinds.description: Hint of which Kinds the target_ua should read. Informational — the UA itself decides via its tools.

icon.description: Single emoji shown next to the oracle.

question.description: The perpetual question this oracle pursues.

target_ua.description: Slug of the Agent that runs this oracle (e.g. 'oracle-health'). The UA owns the persona, tools, and LLM config — Insight only points.

out.question: Is the SDLC ledger healthy this week?

spec.question: Is the SDLC ledger healthy this week?
